text:
+--On 2 d=C3=A9cembre 2013 18:22:41 +0000 Leo Vandewoestijne
<freebsd@dns-lab.com> wrote:
| What tar and version were you using?

I don't get it, really. I've tried with 9.1, 9.2, 8.3 and 8.4, it always
work just how it's supposed to work. It also works in my local poudriere
builds [1] and I got no errors from QAT either.

I use stock everything, no custom tar or anything.

After you do make install, what do you have in the directory that "make
-VSTAGEDIR" gives you ?
